answer_text: Sahih al-Bukhari, Hadith 7277: Narrated `Abdullah: The best talk (speech) is Allah's Book 'Qur'an), and the best way is the way of Muhammad, and the worst matters are the heresies (those new things which are introduced into the religion); and whatever you have been promised will surely come to pass, and you cannot escape (it).

hadith_support.english_text:
The best talk (speech) is Allah's Book 'Qur'an), and the best way is the way of Muhammad, and the 
worst matters are the heresies (those new things which are introduced into the religion); and whatever 
you have been promised will surely come to pass, and you cannot escape (it).

conversation_id.notes: Accepted and surfaced for follow-up support. Latest-anchor hydration is available for narrow anchored follow-up when a conversation id or stable client session is present.

parent_turn_id.notes: Accepted and surfaced for follow-up support. Parent-turn hydration is available when the caller supplies a prior turn id emitted by the conversation surface.

anchor_refs.notes: Accepted and surfaced for future follow-up support, but not yet used by the planner/runtime to resolve follow-up questions.

language.notes: Accepted as an answer-shaping hint, but bounded answer rendering does not yet guarantee language switching.

verbosity.notes: Accepted as an answer-shaping hint, but bounded answer rendering does not yet guarantee verbosity changes.

citations.notes: Accepted as an answer-shaping hint, but bounded answer rendering does not yet guarantee citation-layout changes.

limit.notes: Used only when Tafsir retrieval is eligible and selected for the request.

source_ids.notes: Current public contract supports up to three Tafsir source ids for source-separated comparative Quran commentary selection.

mode.notes: Current public contract supports bounded explicit Hadith lookup/explain lanes and bounded topical Hadith retrieval. This mode is enforced within that public bounded scope; unrestricted multi-source Hadith answering remains unsupported.

collection_ids.notes: Current public contract supports at most one Hadith collection id; multi-collection selection is deferred.

include_tafsir.notes: Legacy flat compatibility field translated into canonical nested source controls.

tafsir_source_id.notes: Legacy flat compatibility field translated into canonical nested source controls.

tafsir_limit.notes: Legacy flat compatibility field translated into canonical nested source controls.

quran_text_source_id.notes: Legacy flat compatibility field translated into canonical nested source controls.

quran_translation_source_id.notes: Legacy flat compatibility field translated into canonical nested source controls.

hadith_source_id.notes: Legacy flat compatibility field translated into canonical nested source controls.

debug.notes: Legacy flat compatibility field translated into canonical diagnostics controls.

answer.summary_text: Sahih al-Bukhari, Hadith 7277: Narrated `Abdullah: The best talk (speech) is Allah's Book 'Qur'an), and the best way is the way of Muhammad, and the worst matters are the heresies (those new things which are introduced into the religion); and whatever you have been promised will surely come to pass, and you cannot escape (it).

notes.top_level_answer: Canonical public answer surface for /ask and /ask/explain.
notes.result: Legacy compatibility envelope retained temporarily; not the canonical truth layer.
notes.quran_source_selection: Legacy compatibility object; source_policy.quran is the truth layer for source-origin semantics.
notes.conversation: Canonical surfaced follow-up anchors for compatible clients. Narrow anchored follow-up is active when anchors are supplied or hydrated from the current conversation/session.
notes.composition: Canonical LLM-facing composition packet for bounded source-grounded answer rendering.
